title: 3 things Michelle Kim is into right now
optimized_headline: Discover Michelle Kim's 3 current passions shaping her creative journey
raw_excerpt: Isegye Idol If you thought K-pop was weird, virtual idols—humans who perform as anime-style digital characters via motion capture—will blow your mind. My favorite is a girl group called Isegye Idol, created by Woowakgood, a Korean VTuber (a streamer who likewise performs as a digital persona). Isegye Idol’s six members are anonymous, which seems to…
raw_body: Isegye Idol If you thought K-pop was weird, virtual idols—humans who perform as anime-style digital characters via motion capture—will blow your mind. My favorite is a girl group called Isegye Idol, created by Woowakgood, a Korean VTuber (a streamer who likewise performs as a digital persona). Isegye Idol’s six members are anonymous, which seems to…
speedrun: Michelle Kim highlights her fascination with Isegye Idol, a virtual girl group created by Woowakgood, a Korean VTuber. These digital characters, performed through motion capture, are entirely anonymous, adding a layer of intrigue. The rise of such virtual idols indicates a shift in entertainment, blending technology with performance art. This matters now as it reflects evolving audience preferences and the potential for new forms of celebrity.
why_it_matters: Fans of K-pop and digital entertainment could find a new form of engagement through virtual idols like Isegye Idol, enhancing their experience.
The popularity of virtual idols signals a broader trend in the entertainment industry, where digital personas could reshape how we perceive celebrity and fandom.

lenses.eli12: Virtual idols like Isegye Idol are a new twist on music and performance, where animated characters entertain instead of real people. Imagine a concert where the performers are entirely digital, created by technology. This matters to everyday people as it opens up fresh ways to enjoy music and connect with artists, even if they're not 'real' in the traditional sense.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, the rise of virtual idols highlights a growing user interest in unique, digital experiences. This trend could lead to new business opportunities in entertainment and marketing. Companies might explore partnerships with virtual personas to engage audiences in innovative ways, potentially reducing costs associated with traditional talent.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, Isegye Idol utilizes motion capture technology to create lifelike performances by digital characters. This approach allows for real-time animation and interaction with audiences, which could enhance user engagement. However, the anonymity of the performers raises questions about identity and connection in digital spaces.
